name: Eruption
short_description: You are a volcano! Assert your dominance as a force of nature and show puny islanders who's boss! Harness the power of lava, giant rocks, earthquakes, and lightning to cause as much destruction as you can. Do you have what it takes to be a legendary volcano?
detailed_description:
Summary:

You are a volcano! Assert your dominance as a force of nature and show puny islanders who's boss! Harness the power of lava, giant rocks, earthquakes, and lightning to cause as much destruction as you can. Cause enough destruction, and you get to try again, with more powers and targets. Fail and you become dormant. Do you have what it takes to be a legendary volcano?

Features:


  • 3 different islands with unique shapes and terrain, chosen at random at the start of the game
  • 18 different eras with unique challenges
  • Four unique powers with different strengths, ranges, and areas of effect
  • Practice your lava shooting skills in Free Play mode
  • Intuitive controls and simple user interface
  • Procedural placement of villages, forests, and temples: every playthrough is unique

About the team:

Eruption was developed by graduate students at UC Santa Cruz's Center for Games and Playable Media, with art from San Jose State University's BFA students.
